历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum ranking for science subjects fluctuated significantly: approximately 95 → 85 → 152 → 87. In 2023, it dropped sharply to 152, but rebounded to 87 in 2024, showing a high-level oscillating pattern. The most recent reliable benchmark is the 2024 ranking of 87. The science enrollment plan from 2021 to 2024 was 10, 10, 15, and 10 respectively. In 2026, the physics category plan is 10, unchanged from 2024. The humanities plan was 2 each year from 2021 to 2024, but in 2026, the history category plan increases to 7, a significant expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 15th in 2021 to 11th in 2026, firmly among the top engineering institutions in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is notably negative, mainly due to Yang Yun's misconduct in teacher ethics and academic integrity, which may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 56th (relatively hot), with moderate to high short video exposure. The 'National Defense Seven Sons' label continues to attract attention. No significant gaps in application submissions have been observed. It has 16 A- or above disciplines, including 7 A+ disciplines: Aerospace Science and Technology, Instrument Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, and Software Engineering. Its disciplinary strength is extremely prominent and highly aligned with its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information, and communication majors are highly popular and recommended, aligning well with Beihang's engineering strengths. Artificial intelligence majors are approached with cautious observation. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Qinghai Province is approximately 48,000, a slight increase from 2025. The estimated number of physics category examinees is about 30,670, leading to a slight intensification of competition. Beihang is located in Beijing, a nationally top-tier university, and enrolls a small number of students in Qinghai (about 10 in science), so regional preference has limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the high-level oscillating trend of science rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a slight increase in the number of examinees, and negative reputation publicity, it is expected that competition in science in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2024. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 92, with a range of 42 to 142.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Artificial Intelligence (Outstanding Talent Cultivation Experimental Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Includes Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Applied Physics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (42–142), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main target, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within the top 60), you can focus on reaching for the Future Aerospace Leading Plan and Artificial Intelligence Outstanding Talent Class. If your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (after 120), it is recommended to primarily consider the Aerospace Category and Science Experimental Class.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2024, the minimum liberal arts ranking was approximately 95 → 107 → 127, showing a trend of moving backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 32 positions over the past 3 years. The 2024 ranking of 127 is the most recent available baseline. The liberal arts enrollment plan was 2 students each year from 2021 to 2024, but in 2026, the History Category plan significantly increased to 7 students, an expansion of 250%, leading to a notable change in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, with its Soft Science ranking continuously rising to 11th in 2026, making it a top national engineering institution. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative (due to the Yang Yun incident), which may somewhat suppress application enthusiasm. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 56th (relatively hot), and the label of 'Seven Sons of National Defense' continues to attract attention. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A, related to some directions of the Social Science Experimental Class (including Law, Administrative Management, Economics). Management Science and Engineering is rated A+, while Law has no separate rating, but Beihang's Law program has developed rapidly in recent years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has a socially recommended popularity (relatively hot), while Economics is in a wait-and-see state of divergence. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Qinghai Province is about 17,330, a slight increase from 2025. Beihang is located in Beijing, and the liberal arts only recruit one major category, the Social Science Experimental Class, with a small number of students but a significant expansion in 2026, increasing application opportunities.

预测结论.text: Considering the trend of liberal arts rankings moving backward year by year, the significant expansion of the 2026 History Category enrollment plan (from 2 to 7 students), and a slight increase in the number of examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts in 2026 will be notably lower than in 2024. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 308, with a range of 258 to 358.
